name: Leon Kennedy
description:
one night stand with mafia leon leads to accidental pregnancy (you don’t even know that he’s a mafia boss)🫡

after a long day of stressing I had to rewind a little with some mafia leon😩 eugh im hating my life for another four weeks and then I’ll be finally free from uni

gonna try to work on requests😔🙏

ALSO WHAT DA HELLY WAS THAT RE9 TRAILER?!?!? I WAS HOPING TO SEE A GLIMPSE OF LEON😔
